goal: SQL: commit events P2/P3 с валидным claim для line_id 3/5 (v1 20250704) + source1/source2 gap

assumptions: Valid claim defined as repair_claim_source>0 and repair_claim_start_day>0 and repair_claim_end_day>0. Commit event defined as commit_p2>0 or commit_p3>0. line_id interpreted as repair_claim_line_id. Risks if false: missing or extra events.
changes: SQL-only SELECT queries on sim_masterv2_v9; recorded phase_start + handoff in config/agent_kg.json.
evidence_pack: Backfill2.1 standard: evidence source=Facts/Changes in legacy record.
facts: DESCRIBE TABLE sim_masterv2_v9 confirmed columns: repair_claim_* and commit_p2/commit_p3 (ClickHouse). Query1 (commit events) returned 20 rows for line_id 3/5 with valid claim. Query2 (source2 vs prev source1) returned 2 rows for (line 3, day 3009) and (line 5, day 3023).
